description: Record provider terms, robots expectations, authentication constraints, storage restrictions, rate limits, retention rules, and allowed automation paths for Exa, SAM.gov, OpenGov, BidNet, and browser-fetched public sites. Bind policy decisions to adapter configuration so unsupported behavior cannot be silently enabled. Acceptance: each production provider has an adopt/defer/reject decision and operational limits before canary traffic.
title: Complete provider compliance and rate policy review
